title: Solo Leveling Texture Pack
description: This project adds custom solo leveling textures
body:
This is Version 1.2.2

![Solo Leveling pack 1.2.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84b5e56d8b6d023cac34e23f817d762aebe21ef5_0.webp)

This is version 1.1
![Solo Leveling pack 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0faa4dee243884ca41ab461bd95e7b39aab48d29.png)

You can use these textueres as you like and i hope you like them.
I will make more updates but not much...
This was super easy to make and if you want to make your own try my template on my profile page.
